N:=72;

        + 2*u^14*(u + 1)^11*(u^2 + u + 1)^5*(3*u^9 - 2*u^8 - 47*u^7 - 107*u^6 - 109*u^5 - 51*u^4 - 4*u - 1)*v^2
        + 4*u^17*(u + 1)^12*(u^2 + u + 1)^6*(u^3 - 3*u - 1)*v
        + u^19*(u + 1)^13*(u^2 + u + 1)^6;
G:=-1/u;

4-9511376*G^6*x^3+2231292*G^6*x^2+618044*G^6*x-332864*G^6-15000*G^5*x^16+120456*G^5*x^15-417756*G^5*x^14+824016*G^5*x^13-1266234*G^5*x^12+2959800*G^5*x^11-8037660*G^5*x^10+14865912*G^5*x^9-16667754*G^5*x^8+10644576*G^5*x^7-3749604*G^5*x^6+2157384*G^5*x^5-2944164*G^5*x^4+2017368*G^5*x^3-352512*G^5*x^2-239400*G^5*x+100674*G^5+1600*G^4*x^16-12820*G^4*x^15+44490*G^4*x^14-87820*G^4*x^13+157150*G^4*x^12-507920*G^4*x^11+1549170*G^4*x^10-2954500*G^4*x^9+3340460*G^4*x^8-2058420*G^4*x^7+551360*G^4*x^6-211460*G^4*x^5+436600*G^4*x^4-310780*G^4*x^3+19010*G^4*x^2+67920*G^4*x-24045*G^4-104*G^3*x^16+832*G^3*x^15-2896*G^3*x^14+5744*G^3*x^13-14460*G^3*x^12+68304*G^3*x^11-226104*G^3*x^10+440048*G^3*x^9-497640*G^3*x^8+285984*G^3*x^7-35744*G^3*x^6-13536*G^3*x^5-37824*G^3*x^4+30528*G^3*x^3+6368*G^3*x^2-13808*G^3*x+4308*G^3+3*G^2*x^16-24*G^2*x^15+84*G^2*x^14-168*G^2*x^13+975*G^2*x^12-6564*G^2*x^11+22758*G^2*x^10-44868*G^2*x^9+50088*G^2*x^8-24636*G^2*x^7-4698*G^2*x^6+8460*G^2*x^5+297*G^2*x^4-1272*G^2*x^3-1776*G^2*x^2+1872*G^2*x-531*G^2-46*G*x^12+376*G*x^11-1324*G*x^10+2632*G*x^9-2808*G*x^8+816*G*x^7+1312*G*x^6-1280*G*x^5+292*G*x^4-48*G*x^3+184*G*x^2-144*G*x+38*G+x^12-8*x^11+28*x^10-56*x^9+49*x^8+28*x^7-98*x^6+76*x^5-21*x^4+4*x^3-6*x^2+4*x-1)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
